## [12:09 - 15:12]

nothing particularly wrong with that because this is how you build rapport with people fast by meeting people where they are and matching their energy. For me, when I'm talking to my team every single day, there are moments that require high levels of passion. Then there are moments that require deep levels of focus. And this is what makes you magnetic and charismatic as a communicator. You don't just contribute a thought, you shift people's energy. So practically, how do you do this? How do you not only match people's energy but actually set the tone of the room so that others follow your lead? Step number one, you have to learn to read the room. Understand how people are currently showing up with their level of energy. Think about how people are using their voice. Are they loud? Are they quiet? Are they talking fast or slow? Is the topic playful or is it serious and heavy? Once you get a good read of the room, step two is to match and mirror them. If they're calm and thoughtful, don't engage them with a loud volume. And only once you feel you're in rapport, then you move to step three, which is to shift your voice slowly to guide them to the energy level you want it to be at.
